prose:
The frontier-orbital gap of TEMPO was computed using the `frontier-orbitals` skill of the `chemkit` tool.

**TEMPO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`. SCF converged in 12 cycles.

HOMO energy = −6.3375 eV
LUMO energy = −2.4651 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap = 3.8724 eV
